outlook.volatilityExpectation: Moderate to high volatility expected; mixed GEX profile with positive 0DTE offset by negative Weekly/Monthly exposure amplifying downside moves
outlook.summary: Bearish sentiment dominates with extreme put positioning (PCR 3.92 monthly). Critical 640 support resonates across all expiries with 125K+ Weekly OI. Spot near 660 weekly max pain with massive 0DTE volume (9x OI ratio) suggests intraday pinning. Negative gamma in longer expiries amplifies downside risk if 655 support breaks.

levels.motivazione: RESONANCE: Massive PUT OI across ALL expiries - 0DTE 11K, WEEKLY 125K, MONTHLY 102K. Primary structural support with bearish skew confirmation (1.32 ratio).
0DTE gamma flip at 654.93 coincides with Max Pain 654. Critical intraday equilibrium where dealer gamma shifts. Negative Weekly/Monthly GEX amplifies moves below this level.
Weekly Max Pain with massive 0DTE volume spike (VOL 145K vs OI 15K = 9.4x ratio). Near spot creates strong magnetic attraction. Heavy OI both sides: 34K CALL, 29K PUT.
RESONANCE: PUT support across all expiries - 0DTE 17K, WEEKLY 37K, MONTHLY 46K. Secondary structural defense validated by bearish skew.
CONFLUENCE: CALL resistance at 0DTE 22K, WEEKLY 15K OI. Overhead supply zone limits upside. Additional PUT OI in Monthly creates sticky resistance.
CONFLUENCE: Strong PUT OI in WEEKLY 32K, MONTHLY 72K. Intermediate support zone between gamma flip and major 640 support.
Monthly Max Pain level with CALL OI 18K at 690 above. Upside target for longer-term mean reversion. Extreme PCR 3.92 suggests overshoot risk.
